notes: It launches and will play fine but none of the in-game videos seem to work. This prevented me from moving beyond the tutorial as a movie scene plays afterwards. It would just get stuck on a black screen. I used my Windows partition to get past the tutorial and so far it has played fine for the few quests I have done.
title: Pagan Online

notes: install start play runs perfect with max settings
title: Pagan Online

notes:
The game has no graphical glitches, no matter what settings you choose.
BUT: at the end of the tutorial appears just a black screen.
title: Pagan Online

notes:
You can play through the intro but can't complete it, because the cutscene at the end doesn't seem to play correctly and just displays a black window. After restarting the game, you will have to do the intro again, meaning you can't progress into the actual game. Doing the intro on a Windows machine and switching afterwards might work.

I also experienced stuttering audio, that could be fixed by overriding xaudio2_7 through winecfg.
title: Pagan Online

notes: You will need to skip the initial tutorial through the pause menu and restart the game afterwards. This way you get around the black screen after the tutorial. The main game runs fine so far.
title: Pagan Online

notes: Started on Windows when it came out, moved to playing on Linux and it runs 1 to 1 performance-wise on the same machine out of the box.  Can't comment on the tutorial issue, but I suspect it's pre-rendered cutscene related like many games.  I haven't yet reached another one since I switched over to Linux, but I'll post another review after I do.
title: Pagan Online

notes: Movies don't work, but can be skipped, so not gamebreaking. Except the end movie of tutorial mission, which seemed to freeze it. No in-game control mapping yet, game uses X Keyboard layout, you may need to switch this before launching (window manager settings are ignored).
title: Pagan Online

notes: Installed and ran out of the box with no issues. Was able to maintain 144fps+ during all my testing. I didn't have to play the tutorial which apparently causes issues as I had already started my account on Windows. I've played about 2-3 hours so far with no loading issues. Occasionally I will get some frame stutter but hardly noticeable. This plays smooth.
title: Pagan Online

notes: Everything is tested. Ingame movies can't be played but CAN be skipped. You can also wait for a movie to end.
title: Pagan Online

notes: Played the game for 200+ hrs, worked fine (save for the movies), newest patch introduces random crashes (5-10min intervals), rendering the game unplayable. Windows apparently does not suffer from this. Gonna update this as soon as they drop the next patch.
title: Pagan Online

notes: Hotpatch fixed crash issues, some performance issues still remain(minor lags, occasional 2sec freeze). Game works mostly fine though.

notes: Runs well out-of-the-box, just the videos stay black and the tutorial must be skipped too. Otherwise, it performs excellent.
